steps.task: Review the project brief and identify missing context, contradictions, and personalization tasks before content work starts.
Review the trend report and source registry. Produce research gaps, source-risk notes, and concrete trend-research tasks.
Turn the brief and research into sharper positioning, voice rules, and content-pillar improvements.
Adapt the request to each selected platform's algorithm, format expectations, audience behavior, research sources, and approval blockers.
Review the 30-day calendar for cadence, format variety, platform fit, and missing proof points.

Review the requested draft target. Improve clarity, specificity, platform fit, proof-awareness, and CTA quality without inventing offers, free trials, signups, discounts, testimonials, or claims not present in the brief.
Review reel scripts for first-three-second strength, visual beats, editability, and missing assets.
Review visual briefs against the local model route. Produce practical image prompt and ComfyUI readiness improvements.
Audit the workspace for platform, source, license, and publishing risks. Block unsafe automation and list approval blockers.
Prepare a human-review publishing package. Do not publish. List exact manual/export steps and missing approvals.
Use the existing persona report and drafts to identify likely objections, drop-off points, and content improvements.
Run a final adversarial QA pass. Decide what is not good enough for human approval and convert it into regeneration tasks.
Summarize reusable preferences, rejected patterns, and regeneration tasks learned from this workflow run.
